mapper.sql: id, tournament_id, user_id, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tournament_player (tournament_id, user_id, status) VALUES (#{tournamentId}, #{userId}, #{status})

INSERT INTO tournament_player (tournament_id, user_id, status) VALUES
(#{item.tournamentId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tournament_player WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT rel_id AS relId, tournament_id AS tournamentId, tournament_name AS tournamentName, user_id AS userId, username, jersey_name AS jerseyName, jersey_number AS jerseyNumber, position, team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName, team_short_name AS teamShortName, team_logo AS teamLogo, team_gender AS teamGender, team_gender_name AS teamGenderName, team_sport_type AS teamSportType, team_sport_type_name AS teamSportTypeName, role, role_name AS roleName, portrait_photo AS portraitPhoto, player_status AS playerStatus, player_status_name AS playerStatusName, register_time AS registerTime FROM v_tournament_player_info WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY register_time DESC

SELECT tp.id AS relId, tp.tournament_id AS tournamentId, t.name AS tournamentName, tp.user_id AS userId, u.username, -- player 字段（如果有球员记录） p.jersey_name AS jerseyName, p.jersey_number AS jerseyNumber, p.position, -- team 字段 team.id AS teamId, team.name AS teamName, team.short_name AS teamShortName, team.logo AS teamLogo, team.gender AS teamGender, CASE team.gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' WHEN 2 THEN '女' WHEN 3 THEN '混合' ELSE '未知' END AS teamGenderName, team.type AS teamSportType, CASE team.type WHEN 1 THEN '足球' WHEN 2 THEN '篮球' WHEN 3 THEN '排球' ELSE '未知' END AS teamSportTypeName, -- team_member 字段（直接从 tm 获取，不经过 player） tm.role, CASE tm.role WHEN 1 THEN '队员' WHEN 2 THEN '队长' WHEN 3 THEN '教练' WHEN 4 THEN '领队' ELSE '未知' END AS roleName, tm.portrait_photo AS portraitPhoto, -- tournament_player 字段 tp.status AS playerStatus, CASE tp.status WHEN 0 THEN '审核中' WHEN 1 THEN '可出战' WHEN 2 THEN '禁赛中' WHEN 3 THEN '退出' ELSE '未知' END AS playerStatusName, tp.create_time AS registerTime FROM tournament_player tp INNER JOIN tournament t ON tp.tournament_id = t.id INNER JOIN user u ON tp.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN team ON team.id = #{teamId} LEFT JOIN team_member tm ON tm.user_id = tp.user_id AND tm.team_id = #{teamId} LEFT JOIN player p ON p.tm_id = tm.id WHERE tp.tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND tp.user_id IN ( SELECT tm2.user_id FROM team_member tm2 WHERE tm2.team_id = #{teamId} ) ORDER BY tp.create_time DESC
